name: Eyeball Potion
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a small ice-cream scoop, place 2 scoops of whipped topping into each of 10 dessert dishes to form "eyeballs."
2. Place a blueberry or raisin in each scoop for the "pupil." Freeze for 30 minutes, or until firm.
3. Meanwhile, stir boiling water into gelatin in a large bowl for at least two minutes until completely dissolved.
4. Mix cold water and ice cubes to make 2-1/2 cups. Add to gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened. Remove any remaining ice.
5. Pour about 1/2 cup of gelatin around the "eyeballs" in each dish, leaving the top of the "eyeballs" exposed. Refrigerate for 1-1/2 hours, or until firm.
